summary: I visited the Barbeque Nation outlet at Forum Shantiniketan Mall for dinner with a group of six people. My overall experience was good. I found the starters and buffet to be good, and I also enjoyed the kulfi and drinks. The service and ambience were both good, and I had a smooth booking experience. I don't have any specific suggestions to offer at this time.
translatedTranscript:
**Staff:** Hello, this is from Barbeque Nation Head Office.

**Customer:** Yes, tell me.

**Staff:** Sir, you visited the Barbeque Nation outlet at Forum Shantiniketan Mall for dinner yesterday?

**Customer:** Yes.

**Staff:** This is a feedback call regarding that, sir. This call will be recorded for improvement purposes. How was your overall experience yesterday?

**Customer:** It was good.

**Staff:** How was the food in the starters and buffet?

**Customer:** No, it was good. Everything was good.

**Staff:** Everything was good? Kulfi and drinks as well?

**Customer:** Yes.

**Staff:** How many members had gone, sir?

**Customer:** Sorry?

**Staff:** How many persons had gone, sir?

**Customer:** Six, six.

**Staff:** Okay. And how was the service and ambience there?

**Customer:** Yes, everything was good.

**Staff:** Everything was good? The booking experience as well?

**Customer:** Yes, good.

**Staff:** Okay. And would you like to give any suggestions from your side?

**Customer:** No, nothing like that.

**Staff:** Thank you so much for sharing your valuable feedback with us. Thank you.

summary: I visited the Barbeque Nation outlet at Forum Shantiniketan Mall for lunch yesterday with a group of eight people. My overall experience was excellent. I found the starters and buffet to be very good. The service and ambience were also very good, and I had a smooth booking experience. Additionally, the kulfi and drinks were very good. I don't have any other suggestions to provide.

**Customer:** Uh, it was good, very good.

**Staff:** Okay. Any other suggestion apart from this all sir?

**Customer:** No ma'am, that's it.

**Staff:** Okay sir, thank you so much for your valuable feedback and time. Thank you.

summary: I visited the Bangalore JP Nagar outlet for dinner with my wife and my kid, who is below five years old. My overall experience was excellent. The taste of the starters and the buffet was great and very excellent. I was particularly impressed with the service; Bittu served us very well and provided excellent service, so much so that I made sure to ask for his name. The ambience and hygiene were also very great, and the booking and billing process was seamless. We enjoyed the chocolate kulfi, which was very good. Although the drinks were not part of our package and we paid extra for them, the watermelon juice and virgin mojito were nice. I found the staff to be very empathetic and have no suggestions for improvement as everything was very good.
translatedTranscript:
**Staff:** Hello.

**Customer:** Yes.

**Staff:** Sir, I am Hansika calling from the Barbeque Nation Head Office, sir.

**Customer:** Yes, ma'am, please tell me.

**Staff:** Sir, yesterday you have visited to the Bangalore JP Nagar outlet for your dinner, sir.

**Customer:** Yes, ma'am.

**Staff:** Sir, this is the feedback call and the call will be recorded for our quality purpose, sir.

**Customer:** Yes, ma'am, tell me.

**Staff:** Sir, how was your overall experience there?

**Customer:** Yeah, it was good. It was excellent.

**Staff:** Okay, and how was the taste of the starter and buffet, sir?

**Customer:** Sir, it was... ma'am, it was very excellent. It was great.

**Staff:** Okay, and how was the service, ambience, and hygiene, sir?

**Customer:** So, ma'am, I think I was served by Bittu over there. And I think, yes ma'am, he served very well. Excellent service.

**Staff:** Okay, sir.

**Customer:** Yeah, I also asked his name also, that what is your name. So I already remember that, yes ma'am, he served very well.

**Staff:** Okay, sir. And how was the ambience and hygiene, sir?

**Customer:** Yes, ma'am, ambience and hygiene was very great.

**Staff:** Okay, and sir, how was the booking and billing experience?

**Customer:** Yeah, it was seamless.

**Staff:** Okay, and how was the kulfi there, sir?

**Customer:** Ma'am, kulfi was very fine. We had a chocolate kulfi.

**Staff:** Okay. How was that in taste?

**Customer:** Sorry?

**Staff:** How was that, sir?

**Customer:** Ma'am, it was very good.

**Staff:** Okay, and how was the drinks there, sir?

**Customer:** Ma'am, we had... I think the drinks wasn't served like in the package. We ordered by paying extra money.

**Staff:** Okay, so how was the drinks there, sir?

**Customer:** Ma'am, drinks was nice. We ordered watermelon juice and I think we have ordered one virgin mojito.

**Staff:** Yes. Okay, sir. And do you want to give any suggestion, sir?

**Customer:** Ma'am, no ma'am. It was very good. It was very good. People are very empathetic over there.

**Staff:** Okay. And sir, with how many people you have visited there?

**Customer:** Ma'am, with my family. My wife and my kid.

**Staff:** Okay, and sir, your kid was below five years or above five years?

**Customer:** No ma'am, he is below five years, ma'am.

**Staff:** Okay, sir. And thank you so much for sharing the feedback, sir.

**Customer:** Okay, ma'am. Okay, thank you, ma'am.

**Staff:** Have a good day, sir. Bye.

**Customer:** Bye, ma'am.
specialMentions: Bittu provided excellent service and served the customer very well, leading the customer to specifically ask for his name.
The chocolate kulfi was mentioned as being very good in taste.
The watermelon juice and virgin mojito were specifically mentioned as being nice.
The staff in general were praised for being very empathetic.

summary: I visited the Bangalore JP Nagar outlet for dinner with two other people (3 pax total). My overall experience was excellent and I had no issues at all. I found the taste of the starters and the buffet to be very good and excellent. The cocktails we ordered were also very good. The service, ambience, and hygiene were all good, and I had a smooth booking and billing experience. I didn't try the kulfi during this visit, but I would definitely recommend the Big Buffet concept to others.

summary: I visited the Barbeque Nation JP Nagar outlet for lunch with a group of about six people. My overall experience was really good and I have no complaints. The starters and buffet were all nice, and the service was good. I found the booking and billing process to be very smooth; even though I didn't use the app, the staff helped me book seamlessly over the phone. The Kulfi was nice as well. Regarding beverages, we only had soft drinks, but the Guava Chilli juice was really awesome. It was a pretty much a good lunch and I don't have any suggestions for improvement.

**Customer:** Hello.

**Customer:** Uh, yeah, it was—it was really good.

**Staff:** Okay, and how was the starter and buffet, sir?

**Customer:** Yeah, all nice, no—no complaints.

**Staff:** Okay, and how was the services, ambience, and hygiene, sir?

**Customer:** The service was good, the ambience...

**Staff:** Okay, and how was the booking and billing experience, sir?

**Customer:** Uh, yeah, it's all nice. I think I—I got to know—I booked it seamlessly over the phone and not through the app, but they were able to help me.

**Staff:** Okay, sir. And sir, with how many people you have visited there?

**Customer:** Uh, we were round about six—six members.

**Staff:** Okay, and how was the Kulfi there, sir?

**Customer:** Sorry, drinks?

**Staff:** Yes.

**Staff:** Okay, sir. And do you want to give any suggestion, sir?

**Customer:** Uh, no, I think, yeah, it was just pretty much a good lunch. So, thank you for asking me for your JP Nagar visit.

**Staff:** Okay, sir. And thank you so much for sharing the feedback, sir.

**Customer:** Thank you.

**Staff:** Have a good day, sir. Bye.

**Customer:** You too.
specialMentions: The Guava Chilli juice was described as really awesome.
The booking process was praised for being seamless over the phone with helpful staff assistance.

summary: I visited Barbeque Nation at Pacific Mall for dinner with two adults, a child, and a three-year-old. My overall experience was good and everything was perfect. The service and ambience were good, and the food, including the starters and buffet, was also good. I had no problems with the booking or billing. I have a suggestion that the fries would be better if salt was added to them. I specifically want to commend Jaya, who served us food, for her service.
translatedTranscript: **Staff:** Hello. Good afternoon, Ma'am. I am calling from the Barbeque Nation Head Office. This is a feedback call recorded for improvement. You visited Pacific Mall, Ma'am, for dinner. How was your overall experience? **Customer:** Experience was good. **Staff:** Thank you. How did you find the service and ambience, Ma'am? **Customer:** Hmm, everything was good, perfect. **Staff:** And the starters and buffet, Ma'am? **Customer:** Sorry? **Staff:** Food... how did you find the starters and buffet, Ma'am? **Customer:** Food was also good. **Staff:** And your booking and billing experience? Did you face any problems? **Customer:** No, no, no problem. **Staff:** And how many people were you? **Customer:** We were two adults plus one kid, and one smaller child who was free of cost, a three-year-old child. **Staff:** Okay, Ma'am. And any suggestions, Ma'am? **Customer:** Uh, I don't have any such suggestions, but yes, in the fries, if you add salt, it will be better. **Staff:** Okay, Ma'am, I will forward this to my team. And thank you for your feedback. Have a nice day, Ma'am. **Customer:** Wait, wait, wait. I want to mention the name of the person who was serving us food: Jaya. **Staff:** Jaya? **Customer:** Yes, Jaya. **Staff:** Okay, Ma'am, I will mention her name. And have a nice day, Ma'am. **Customer:** Thank you.
specialMentions: Jaya provided great service while serving the customer food.

issueTickets.description: The customer suggested adding salt to the fries to improve the taste.

**Staff:** Sir, you recently visited Pacific Mall for lunch. How was your overall experience?

**Customer:** Very good.

**Staff:** Thank you. How did you find the service and the ambience, sir?

**Customer:** [Audio cuts out]

summary: I visited the Rohini outlet for lunch with a group of about 7 to 8 people. My overall experience was very good as the service and food were both good. I appreciated that they prepared everything exactly according to our preferences. The starters, buffet, and ambience were all okay, and I found the kulfi and drinks to be fine as well. The booking process was smooth and the pricing felt right. I want to specially mention Ravi, who served us; he managed everything very well and took great care of our table.

summary: I visited the Rohini outlet with a group of five people for lunch. My overall experience was just okay because I was charged more than the MRP for a cold drink can. While the food taste was good, the kulfi and other drinks were not served to us during our visit. The service and ambience were fine, and I didn't face any issues with the booking process itself, but the overcharging on the beverage was a significant concern for me.
translatedTranscript:
**Staff:** Hello?

**Customer:** Hello.

**Staff:** Hello, good evening sir. This is Kavita calling from Barbeque Nation Head Office. This is a short feedback call. The call will be recorded for our improvement. Sir, yesterday you had been to Rohini Barbeque Nation for lunch. Is this Mr. Tanish?

**Customer:** Yes, ma'am.

**Staff:** Yes sir. May I know how was the overall experience there?

**Customer:** Ma'am, the overall experience was okay, but the cold drink can I took there...

**Staff:** Cold drink?

**Customer:** Yes, I took a cold drink can, a can.

**Staff:** Yes.

**Customer:** So, they charged me more than the MRP price for it.

**Staff:** Okay, I will definitely forward this matter, sir. Sorry for that part, sir. I will forward this to the concerned team. But how was the food taste, starters, and buffet, sir?

**Customer:** Ma'am, the taste was good.

**Staff:** Okay sir. And how was the service and environment of the restaurant, sir?

**Customer:** Ma'am, the service was also okay.

**Staff:** Okay sir. And how was the ambience, sir?

**Customer:** Ambience was also okay.

**Staff:** Okay sir. Did you try any drinks or kulfi? How were the kulfi and drinks, sir?

**Customer:** What ma'am?

**Staff:** Did you try the drinks and kulfi? How were the kulfi and drinks, sir?

**Customer:** No ma'am, those were not served to us.

**Staff:** Okay. The drinks you tried, you only took the drinks?

**Customer:** I took a cold drink can.

**Staff:** Okay sir. All right sir. And you didn't try the kulfi?

**Customer:** No ma'am.

**Staff:** Okay sir. How were the drinks, sir? Was there any issue with the drinks?

**Customer:** No ma'am.

**Staff:** Okay sir. How was the booking experience? Was there any issue with the booking, sir?

**Customer:** They charged over the price.

**Staff:** Okay, that was the only issue. I will definitely forward this matter, sir. Sorry for that part, sir. Otherwise, how many members were you?

**Customer:** Ma'am, five members.

**Staff:** All right. And there was no issue with the booking, sir?

**Customer:** No ma'am.

**Staff:** All right. Any other suggestions you would like to give?

**Customer:** No ma'am.

**Staff:** Okay sir. Regarding the drinks, I will definitely forward it to the concerned team. Sorry for that part, sir. And also, sir, thank you for your valuable feedback and time. Have a good day, sir. Bye-bye.

**Customer:** Thank you.

issueTickets.description: The customer complained that the restaurant charged him a price higher than the MRP for a cold drink can.
The customer mentioned that kulfi and other drinks were not served to their table during the meal.
